subject: Vladimir from Disney's Tangled — a massively built, fur-collared thug figure holding what appears to be a broken or shattering ceramic object with distressed intensity
description: A barrel-chested humanoid figure with enormous arms and a fur-collared leather coat dominates the frame. A helmet or horned headgear sits atop the figure's head. In raised hands, the figure holds something that appears to be shattering or crumbling — fragments and shards flying outward with a bright flash at the point of contact. The expression is one of intense focus or distress. The background is a moody green atmospheric haze with warm orange glowing elements suggesting fires or lanterns in the distance.
foreground: Massive humanoid figure in fur-collared coat holding a shattering object, fragments flying
background: Green atmospheric haze with orange glowing elements in distance
emotion: intense distress or passionate focus, wide-eyed expression
